name: node-icss-utils
title: node-icss-utils
description:
ICSS utils for postcss ast
PostCSS is a tool for transforming styles with JS plugins. These plugins can
lint your CSS, support variables and mixins, transpile future CSS syntax,
inline images, and more.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-icss-utils because ICSS utils for postcss ast.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-icss-utils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-icss-utils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-icss-utils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
